note: MT103->pacs.008 translation fidelity scoring. Vector 1: full well-mapped translation (SHA->SHAR correct). Vector 2: charge bearer mismatch OUR->SHAR (should be DEBT). Vector 3: empty-input finite.

vectors.name: full_mt103_well_mapped
vectors.description: Complete MT103 translated to pacs.008 with all fields correctly mapped including SHA->SHAR charge bearer.

mapping_results.note: :20: is the MT reference; pacs.008 requires a new UUIDv4 UETR (not a direct carry-over of :20:).
:50K: 4 lines x 35 chars; Dbtr/Nm allows 140 chars. Name truncation risk if MT line contained both name and account on same line.
:59: 4 lines x 35 chars; Cdtr/Nm max 140 chars. Beneficiary name + address must be split into Nm and PostalAddress24 in pacs.008.
:52A BIC carries directly to DbtrAgt/BICFI. Direct 1-to-1 mapping.
:57A BIC carries directly to CdtrAgt/BICFI. Direct 1-to-1 mapping.
:70: allows 4 lines x 35 chars = 140 chars. RmtInf/Ustrd max 140 chars. Near-identical capacity but line concatenation must not lose data.
OUR->DEBT, SHA->SHAR, BEN->CRED. Direct table mapping.

output_payload.pii_note: MT and pacs.008 field values are processed structurally (presence, length, code mapping). No real party PII processed. Use synthetic message fields for testing.
output_payload.table_source: SWIFT Standards Release Guide MT103 (swift.com/standards); ISO 20022 pacs.008.001.10 message definition (iso20022.org); SWIFT CBPR+ Translation Rules for MT103 to pacs.008 migration
output_payload.regulatory_basis: SWIFT CBPR+ mandatory migration deadline 14 Nov 2026; SWIFT MT103 Standards Release Guide; ISO 20022 pacs.008.001.10

vectors.name: charge_bearer_mapping_error
vectors.description: Only :71A present with OUR (should map to DEBT) but pacs.008 ChrgBr set to SHAR (wrong). Known charge bearer mismatch error.
